title: Fixed-Size Memory Pool Allocator
description: Implement a memory pool allocator for fixed-size blocks, useful for reducing fragmentation and allocation overhead in embedded systems.
requirements: Implement pool_create(block_size, block_count) allocating backing memory
Implement pool_alloc(pool) returning a block or NULL if exhausted
Implement pool_free(pool, ptr) returning block to pool
Use a free list for O(1) allocation/deallocation
Validate that freed pointers belong to the pool
Implement pool_available(pool) returning free block count

few_shot_examples.prompt: Initialize a free list within a memory region.
Check if pointer is within a memory range.
